# Support

How to get help with the `@friday-sandbox/*` packages.

## Documentation

Read the docs before opening an issue, since most questions are answered there.

- The `README.md` in each package under [`packages/`](../packages): install and usage for that package.

## Questions and bugs

1. [Search existing issues](https://github.com/next-friday/friday-sandbox/issues?q=is%3Aissue) first, since yours may already be reported or answered.
2. If it is new, [open an issue](https://github.com/next-friday/friday-sandbox/issues/new/choose) and pick the template that fits:
   - **Bug report:** something behaves incorrectly.
   - **Feature request:** a new capability or change.
   - **Task:** a tracked unit of work.

Blank issues are disabled, so choose a template and fill in every field. The more detail, the faster the help.

## Security

Do not report vulnerabilities in a public issue. Follow the [security policy](SECURITY.md) to disclose privately.

## Contributing

Want to fix it yourself? See [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../CONTRIBUTING.md) for the workflow and quality gates.
